name: @krokedil/plugin-dev-zip-tests
description: Shared e2e tests for Krokedil plugin dev zips using WordPress Playground and Playwright.

scripts.clean:e2e: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const rm=(p)=>fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); rm(path.join('test-results', 'end-to-end')); rm('playground-temp-logs');"
scripts.clean:e2e:full: npm run clean:e2e && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const rm=(p)=>fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); rm('playground-snapshots');"
scripts.test: npm run clean:e2e && npx playwright test --config=end-to-end/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run clean:e2e && npx playwright test --ui --config=end-to-end/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:fixture: npm run clean:e2e && PLUGIN_META_JSON="$(cat ../scripts/fixtures/dummy-plugin-for-repo-tests/.github/plugin-meta.json)" E2E_AUTO_MOUNT=../scripts/fixtures/dummy-plugin-for-repo-tests npx playwright test --config=end-to-end/playwright.config.ts
scripts.server: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const { BlueprintBuilder, applyKrokedilBlueprintTemplate } = require('../../scripts/lib/playground/index.js'); (async () => { const outDir='./playground-temp-logs'; fs.mkdirSync(outDir, { recursive: true }); const outPath=path.join(outDir, 'server-blueprint.json'); const b=new BlueprintBuilder({ install_woocommerce: true, install_wc_beta_tester: true }, applyKrokedilBlueprintTemplate); await b.assertValidWithSchema(); fs.writeFileSync(outPath, JSON.stringify(b.blueprint, null, 2) + '\n'); console.log('Blueprint written to ' + outPath); })().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });" && npx @wp-playground/cli server --mount=./playground-temp-logs:/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/krokedil-wp-ci --blueprint=./playground-temp-logs/server-blueprint.json
